sections.paragraph:
Original: קשׁר

Transliteration: qâshar

Phonetic: kaw-shar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to bind, tie, bind together, league together, conspire
    1. (Qal)
      1. to bind, confine
      2. to league together, conspire
    2. (Niphal) to be bound, be bound up
    3. (Piel)
      1. to bind on
      2. to bind fast
      3. to bind, tie
      4. to bind to oneself
    4. (Pual) robust, vigorous (participle)
    5. (Hithpael) to conspire

Origin: a primitive root: to tie, physically (gird, confine, compact) or mentally (in love, league)

TWOT entry: 2090

Part(s) of speech: Verb
